notes: Thread-safety hardening around editor startup, teardown, and async UI handoffs has been validated on Intel and M4 Macs.
Carey LoRA selection, LoRA-specific dice caption pools, and the LoRA strength slider work on the remote backend and on supported gary4local macOS v0.1.6 Carey backends.
Notarized VST3, AU, and Standalone DMGs are included.
Standalone is included, but gary4juce is still designed primarily around DAW workflows.
Close your DAW before replacing plugin files with a downloaded update.
